Class HuggingFaceModel

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractModel
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleModel
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface.HuggingFaceModel
public class HuggingFaceModel extends OpenAiCompatibleModel
A model instance that carries additional metadata discovered from the Hugging Face Hub.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode
    generationConfig
    The raw JSON from the model's 'generation_config.json', used to extract default sampling parameters like temperature and top-p.

    The raw JSON from the model's 'config.json', containing architectural details and token limits.
    private boolean
    supportsFunctionCalling
    Flag derived from the chat template or config indicating if the model supports tool calling.
    private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode
    tokenizerConfig
    The raw JSON from the model's 'tokenizer_config.json', used to discover chat templates and tool support markers.

  • Field Details

    • hubConfig

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode hubConfig
      The raw JSON from the model's 'config.json', containing architectural details and token limits.

    • tokenizerConfig

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode tokenizerConfig
      The raw JSON from the model's 'tokenizer_config.json', used to discover chat templates and tool support markers.

    • generationConfig

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode generationConfig
      The raw JSON from the model's 'generation_config.json', used to extract default sampling parameters like temperature and top-p.

    • supportsFunctionCalling

      private boolean supportsFunctionCalling
      Flag derived from the chat template or config indicating if the model supports tool calling.

  • Constructor Details

    • HuggingFaceModel

      public HuggingFaceModel(HuggingFaceProvider provider, String modelId, String displayName)
      Constructs a new Hugging Face model instance.
      Parameters:
      provider - The owning HF provider.
      modelId - The full repo ID.
      displayName - The display name.

  • Method Details

    • isSupportsFunctionCalling

      public boolean isSupportsFunctionCalling()
      Checks if this model supports native function calling (tools).

      Implementation details: Returns the value discovered during the Hub inspection phase.

      Overrides:
      isSupportsFunctionCalling in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      true if supported.

    • getMaxInputTokens

      public int getMaxInputTokens()
      Gets the maximum number of input tokens supported by this model.

      Implementation details: Prioritizes 'max_position_embeddings' from config.json.

      Specified by:
      getMaxInputTokens in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The input token limit.

    • getMaxOutputTokens

      public int getMaxOutputTokens()
      Gets the maximum number of output tokens this model can generate in a single turn.

      Implementation details: Prioritizes 'max_new_tokens' from generation_config.json.

      Specified by:
      getMaxOutputTokens in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The output token limit.

    • getDefaultTemperature

      public Float getDefaultTemperature()
      Gets the default temperature for this model.

      Temperature controls the randomness of the response. Higher values (e.g., 1.0) make the output more random, while lower values (e.g., 0.2) make it more deterministic.

      Implementation details: Prioritizes the 'temperature' value from generation_config.json if available.

      Overrides:
      getDefaultTemperature in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      The default temperature, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopK

      public Integer getDefaultTopK()
      Gets the default topK for this model.

      Top-K sampling limits the model's choices to the K most likely next tokens.

      Implementation details: Prioritizes the 'top_k' value from generation_config.json if available.

      Overrides:
      getDefaultTopK in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      The default topK, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopP

      public Float getDefaultTopP()
      Gets the default topP for this model.

      Top-P (nucleus) sampling selects tokens whose cumulative probability adds up to the threshold P.

      Implementation details: Prioritizes the 'top_p' value from generation_config.json if available.

      Overrides:
      getDefaultTopP in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      The default topP, or null if not specified.

    • getVersion

      public String getVersion()
      Gets the version string for this model.

      Implementation details: Extracts the model version from the Hub metadata if available.

      Specified by:
      getVersion in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The version.

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets a detailed description of the model's capabilities and limitations.

      Implementation details: Prefixes the description with the architecture type (e.g. [llama]).

      Overrides:
      getDescription in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      The model description.

    • getRawDescription

      public String getRawDescription()
      Gets a rich, potentially HTML-formatted description of the model, including all its metadata.

      Implementation details: Builds a rich HTML view combining architecture, tokenizer class, and deep-inspected sampling parameters.

      Overrides:
      getRawDescription in class OpenAiCompatibleModel
      Returns:
      The raw description string.
